vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd-

triage_decision.reason: File permission adjustment on /etc/passwd- is a low‑risk operation that follows standard STIG hardening patterns for file permissions; unlikely to cause lockout or service disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; potential misconfiguration if incorrect permissions are applied
